claim: PATCH-1 reference function f_v5 (11-dim vector -> decision mode) is a learnable decision surface

interpretation.isolates: judgment layer only; vectors are the validator's synthetic samples, not model-extracted
interpretation.proves: f_v5 is a well-formed learnable mapping; a plain GBDT recovers it and passes the JCS gate
interpretation.does_not_prove: that a language model can extract accurate 11-dim vectors from free text
interpretation.next: extraction-layer benchmark once a base model is selected (see two-layer architecture)
